title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 191.843 - Authorizes grants for regional research consortia in a distressed community
text:
191.843.  Authorizes grants for regional research consortia in a distressed community. — Regional research consortia within a city which lies partially or wholly within an area designated as a distressed community may apply for grants from the state for the purpose of conducting health research, including research into the prevention and cessation of smoking.
(L. 2000 H.B. 1238 § 2)
